print("✅ Bot is starting...")

from telegram import Update, InlineKeyboardButton, InlineKeyboardMarkup
from telegram.ext import (ApplicationBuilder, CommandHandler, CallbackQueryHandler, MessageHandler, ContextTypes, filters)
import sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8')
import requests
import time
import base64
import json
import os

BOT_TOKEN = "7313657410:AAF93wY-dLhkF9tJqa8CwNevGCceVFmhAPU"
OWNER_IDS = [5271319968, #Henk
             2139484996, #Tatanka
             5465285645, #James
             5819508552, #KK
             1553992005, #Shanks
             5259704443, #HB
             2025779463, #Big Dave
             1343247050] #Dave
BOT_USERNAME = "highscoregamingbot"
SCORE_SERVER = "https://highscoregamingbot.pythonanywhere.com"
API_KEY = "cdf2734fwr97vh34"
LAST_TOP_SCORES = {}         # Per chat tijdens challenge
LAST_GLOBAL_TOP = {}         # Per game buiten challenges
GIF_URL = "https://highscoregamingbot.github.io/assets/boomhighscore.gif"
CACHE_FILE = "last_top_scores.json"
POLL_INTERVAL = 5  # Startwaarde
MAX_POLL_INTERVAL = 30
MIN_POLL_INTERVAL = 5
POLL_BACKOFF = 5    # Met hoeveel seconden verhogen bij geen nieuwe scores
CHALLENGE_FILE = "active_challenges.json"

def load_all_challenges_raw():
    if os.path.exists(CHALLENGE_FILE):
        try:
            with open(CHALLENGE_FILE, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                return json.load(f)
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"⚠️ Failed to load full challenge file: {e}")
    return {}

def load_active_challenges():
    raw = load_all_challenges_raw()
    now = int(time.time())
    result = {}
    for key, state in raw.items():
        if state.get("end_time", 0) > now and state.get("active", True):
            # Haal alleen de chat_id uit de key (die is vóór de dubbele punt)
            chat_id_str = str(key).split(":")[0]
            try:
                chat_id = int(chat_id_str)
                result[chat_id] = state
            except:
                print(f"⚠️ Ongeldige chat_id in key: {key}")
    return result

def save_active_challenges():
    try:
        # Combineer actieve en inactieve challenges
        all_challenges = load_all_challenges_raw()
        for chat_id, state in ACTIVE_GAMES.items():
            msg_id = state.get("message_id")
            if msg_id:
                key = f"{chat_id}:{msg_id}"
            else:
                key = f"{chat_id}:{int(time.time())}"  # fallback als message_id er nog niet is
            all_challenges[key] = state
        # Opslaan naar bestand
        with open(CHALLENGE_FILE, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            json.dump(all_challenges, f, indent=2)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"⚠️ Failed to save active challenges: {e}")

def load_last_top_scores():
    if os.path.exists(CACHE_FILE):
        try:
            with open(CACHE_FILE, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                data = json.load(f)
                return {k: int(v) for k, v in data.items()}
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"⚠️ Failed to load score cache: {e}")
    return {}

def save_last_top_scores():
    try:
        with open(CACHE_FILE, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            json.dump(LAST_TOP_SCORES, f)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"⚠️ Failed to save score cache: {e}")


def make_startapp_url(game_id, chat_id=None):
    if chat_id:
        payload = json.dumps({
            "gameId": game_id,
            "chatId": str(chat_id)
        })
        b64_param = base64.urlsafe_b64encode(payload.encode()).decode().rstrip("=")
        return f"https://t.me/{BOT_USERNAME}/launch?startapp={b64_param}"
    else:
        # fallback: directe link naar de game
        return f"https://t.me/{BOT_USERNAME}/{game_id}"

GAMES = [
    {"id": "maze_runner", "name": "Maze Runner"},
    {"id": "brickbreaker", "name": "Brick Breaker"},
    {"id": "oldmanrush", "name": "Oldman Rush"},
    {"id": "ghosty", "name": "Ghosty"},
    {"id": "helixjump", "name": "Helix Jump 3D"},
    {"id": "hopper", "name": "Hopper"},
]

ACTIVE_GAMES = load_active_challenges()

def is_challenge_active_for_game(game_id: str) -> bool:
    return any(state["game_id"] == game_id for state in ACTIVE_GAMES.values())

def get_leaderboard(chat_id, game_id: str, limit: int = 20):
    try:
        url = f"{SCORE_SERVER}/leaderboard?chat_id={chat_id}&game_id={game_id}&limit={limit}"
        r = requests.get(url)
        r.raise_for_status()
        data = r.json()
        data["scores"] = data.get("scores", [])
        # LET OP: nieuwe structuur!
        if "scores" in data:
            if not data["scores"]:
                return [], data.get("message", "(No scores yet)")
            else:
                return [
                  (d.get("first_name", ""), d.get("last_name", ""), d.get("score", 0))
                  for d in data["scores"]
                ], None
        elif isinstance(data, list) and not data:
            return [], "(No scores yet)"
        else:
            return [], "(Unknown response from server)"
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"⚠️ Failed to fetch leaderboard for {game_id}: {e}")
        return [], "(Failed to fetch leaderboard)"

def get_alltime_leaderboard(chat_id, game_id, limit=10):
    try:
        url = f"{SCORE_SERVER}/alltime_leaderboard?chat_id={chat_id}&game_id={game_id}&limit={limit}"
        r = requests.get(url)
        r.raise_for_status()
        data = r.json()
        data["scores"] = data.get("scores", [])
        if "scores" in data:
            if not data["scores"]:
                return [], data.get("message", "(No alltime scores yet)")
            else:
                return [
                    (d.get("first_name", ""), d.get("last_name", ""), d.get("score", 0))
                    for d in data["scores"]
                ], None
        elif isinstance(data, list) and not data:
            return [], "(No alltime scores yet)"
        else:
            return [], "(No scores yet)"
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"⚠️ Failed to fetch alltime leaderboard for {game_id} (chat {chat_id}): {e}")
        return [], "(Failed to fetch alltime leaderboard)"

def get_best_players(chat_id, max_places=10, top_n=3):
    try:
        url = f"{SCORE_SERVER}/best_player_leaderboard?chat_id={chat_id}&limit={top_n}"
        r = requests.get(url)
        r.raise_for_status()
        data = r.json()
        data["scores"] = data.get("scores", [])
        if "scores" in data:
            if not data["scores"]:
                return [], data.get("message", "(No players yet)")
            else:
                return [
                    (d.get("first_name", ""), d.get("last_name", ""), d.get("points", 0))
                    for d in data["scores"]
                ], None
        elif "leaderboard" in data:
            if not data["leaderboard"]:
                return [], "(No players yet)"
            else:
                return [
                    (d.get("first_name", ""), d.get("last_name", ""), d.get("points", 0))
                    for d in data["leaderboard"]
                ], None
        else:
            return [], "(No scores yet)"
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"⚠️ Failed to fetch alltime best players for chat {chat_id}: {e}")
        return [], "(Failed to fetch best players)"

def get_global_leaderboard(game_id: str, limit: int = 20):
    try:
        url = f"{SCORE_SERVER}/global_alltime_leaderboard?game_id={game_id}&limit={limit}"
        r = requests.get(url)
        r.raise_for_status()
        data = r.json()
        if "scores" in data and data["scores"]:
            return [
                (d.get("first_name", ""), d.get("last_name", ""), d.get("score", 0))
                for d in data["scores"]
            ], None
        elif "scores" in data and not data["scores"]:
            return [], "(No global scores yet)"
        else:
            return [], "(Unexpected response format)"
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"⚠️ Failed to fetch global leaderboard for {game_id}: {e}")
        return [], "(Failed to fetch global leaderboard)"

def get_global_best_players(limit: int = 10):
    try:
        url = f"{SCORE_SERVER}/global_best_player?limit={limit}"
        r = requests.get(url)
        r.raise_for_status()
        data = r.json()
        if "scores" in data and data["scores"]:
            return [
                (d.get("first_name", ""), d.get("last_name", ""), d.get("points", 0))
                for d in data["scores"]
            ], None
        elif "scores" in data and not data["scores"]:
            return [], "(No global best players yet)"
        else:
            return [], "(Unexpected response format)"
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"⚠️ Failed to fetch global best players: {e}")
        return [], "(Failed to fetch global best players)"

def get_alltime_chat_leaderboard(game_id: str, limit: int = 10):
    try:
        url = f"{SCORE_SERVER}/alltime_chat_leaderboard?game_id={game_id}&limit={limit}"
        r = requests.get(url)
        r.raise_for_status()
        data = r.json()
        data["scores"] = [
            s for s in data.get("scores", [])
            if str(s.get("chat_title", "")).strip()
        ]
        if "scores" in data and data["scores"]:
            return [
                (d.get("chat_title"), d.get("score", 0))
                for d in data["scores"]
            ], None
        elif "scores" in data and not data["scores"]:
            return [], "(No chat scores yet)"
        else:
            return [], "(Unexpected response format)"
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"⚠️ Failed to fetch alltime chat leaderboard for {game_id}: {e}")
        return [], "(Failed to fetch alltime chat leaderboard)"

def get_best_chat_leaderboard(limit: int = 10):
    try:
        url = f"{SCORE_SERVER}/best_chat_leaderboard?limit={limit}"
        r = requests.get(url)
        r.raise_for_status()
        data = r.json()
        data["scores"] = [
            s for s in data.get("scores", [])
            if str(s.get("chat_title", "")).strip()
        ]

        if "scores" in data and data["scores"]:
            return [
                (d.get("chat_title"), d.get("points", 0))
                for d in data["scores"]
            ], None
        elif "scores" in data and not data["scores"]:
            return [], "(No best chat scores yet)"
        else:
            return [], "(Unexpected response format)"
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"⚠️ Failed to fetch best chat leaderboard: {e}")
        return [], "(Failed to fetch best chat leaderboard)"

def reset_game_scores(game_id: str, chat_id: int):
    url = f"{SCORE_SERVER}/reset_scores"
    data = {"game_id": game_id, "chat_id": chat_id, "api_key": API_KEY}
    r = requests.post(url, data=data)
    r.raise_for_status()
    return r.json()

async def finish_challenge_job(context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    chat_id = context.job.data["chat_id"]
    state = ACTIVE_GAMES.get(chat_id)
    if not state:
        return

    # Stop alle geplande jobs en markeer challenge als verlopen
    stop_challenge_jobs(context, chat_id)

    # Game info ophalen
    game = next((g for g in GAMES if g["id"] == state["game_id"]), None)
    if not game:
        return

    # Leaderboard ophalen
    lb, msg = get_leaderboard(chat_id, game["id"])
    lines = [f"🏁 {game['name']} CHALLENGE FINISHED!", "🎉 FINAL STANDINGS:", ""]
    if msg:
        lines.append(msg)
    else:
        for idx, (fn, ln, score) in enumerate(lb, start=1):
            display_name = f"{fn} {ln}".strip()
            lines.append(f"{idx}. {display_name} — {score}")
    text = "\n".join(lines)

    # Probeer het originele bericht te bewerken (zonder knop)
    try:
        if state.get("message_id"):
            await context.bot.edit_message_text(
                chat_id=chat_id,
                message_id=state["message_id"],
                text=text,
                reply_markup=None
            )
    except Exception as e:
        if "Message to edit not found" in str(e):
            print(f"⚠️ Challenge message missing in chat {chat_id}.")
        elif "Message is not modified" not in str(e):
            print(f"⚠️ Failed to edit challenge message in chat {chat_id}: {e}")

    # Altijd een nieuw bericht met eindstand sturen
    try:
        await context.bot.send_message(chat_id=chat_id, text=text)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"⚠️ Failed to send final standings in chat {chat_id}: {e}")

async def update_challenge_job(context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    chat_id = context.job.data["chat_id"]
    state = ACTIVE_GAMES.get(chat_id)
    if not state:
        return

    game = next((g for g in GAMES if g["id"] == state["game_id"]), None)
    if not game:
        return

    # Geen GIF meer tijdens challenge!
    await edit_challenge_message(context, chat_id)

async def edit_challenge_message(context, chat_id: int, init=False):
    state = ACTIVE_GAMES.get(chat_id)
    if not state:
        return
    game = next((g for g in GAMES if g["id"] == state["game_id"]), None)
    if not game:
        return
    now = int(time.time())
    remaining = max(0, state["end_time"] - now)
    hours = remaining // 3600
    minutes = (remaining % 3600) // 60
    countdown = f"{hours}h {minutes}m" if hours > 0 else f"{minutes}m"
    lb, msg = get_leaderboard(chat_id, game["id"])
    lines = [f"🏁 {game['name']} challenge", f"⏳ Time left: {countdown}", "", f"🏆 {game['name']} Leaderboard", ""]
    if msg:
        lines.append(msg)
    else:
        for idx, (fn, ln, score) in enumerate(lb, start=1):
            display_name = f"{fn} {ln}".strip()
            lines.append(f"{idx}. {display_name} — {score}")
    startapp_url = make_startapp_url(game["id"], chat_id)
    keyboard = InlineKeyboardMarkup([[InlineKeyboardButton("▶️ Play now!", url=startapp_url)]])
    text = "\n".join(lines)
    try:
        if init:
            sent = await context.bot.send_message(chat_id=chat_id, text=text, reply_markup=keyboard)
            ACTIVE_GAMES[chat_id]['message_id'] = sent.message_id
        else:
            await context.bot.edit_message_text(chat_id=chat_id, message_id=state["message_id"], text=text, reply_markup=keyboard)
    except Exception as e:
        if "Message to edit not found" in str(e):
            print(f"Challenge message missing in chat {chat_id}, challenge stopped.")
            stop_challenge_jobs(context, chat_id)
        elif "Message is not modified" not in str(e):
            print(f"Failed to edit challenge message: {e}")

async def send_highscore_gif(context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE, chat_id: int, first_name: str, last_name: str, game_name: str, score: int):
    player_name = f"{first_name} {last_name}".strip()
    caption = (
      f"🏆 <b>{player_name}</b> has a new highscore in <b>{game_name}</b>!\n"
      f"🔥 Score: <b>{score}</b>"
    )
    try:
        await context.bot.send_animation(
            chat_id=chat_id,
            animation=GIF_URL,
            caption=caption,
            parse_mode="HTML"
        )
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"⚠️ Failed to send highscore GIF via URL: {e}")

def owner_only(func):
    async def wrapper(update: Update, context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE, *args, **kwargs):
        user_id = None
        if update.effective_user:
            user_id = update.effective_user.id
        elif getattr(update, 'message', None) and update.message.from_user:
            user_id = update.message.from_user.id
        elif getattr(update, 'callback_query', None) and update.callback_query.from_user:
            user_id = update.callback_query.from_user.id
        if user_id not in OWNER_IDS:
            if getattr(update, 'message', None): await update.message.reply_text("⛔ Only the owner can use this command.")
            elif getattr(update, 'callback_query', None): await update.callback_query.answer("⛔ Only the owner can use this command.", show_alert=True)
            return
        return await func(update, context, *args, **kwargs)
    return wrapper

async def start(update: Update, context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    user = update.effective_user
    ctype = update.effective_chat.type
    if ctype in ["group", "supergroup", "channel"]:
        if user.id in OWNER_IDS:
            kb = [[InlineKeyboardButton(g['name'], callback_data=f"select_game|{g['id']}")] for g in GAMES]
            await update.message.reply_text(
                "Welcome to the Highscore Gaming Bot. Select a game and set a timer.",
                reply_markup=InlineKeyboardMarkup(kb)
            )
        else:
            await update.message.reply_text("⛔ Only the owner can control the bot here.")
        return

@owner_only
async def button_handler(update: Update, context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    q = update.callback_query
    await q.answer()
    chat_id = update.effective_chat.id
    if chat_id in ACTIVE_GAMES:
        await q.edit_message_text("⚠️ A challenge is already running. Please stop it first with /stop.")
        return
    if q.data.startswith("select_game|"):
        selected = q.data.split("|")[1]
        print(f"✅ Game geselecteerd: {selected}")
        context.user_data['selected_game'] = selected
        context.user_data['awaiting_hours'] = True
        msg = await q.edit_message_text("How many hours should the game run? (e.g. 2)")
        context.user_data['hours_prompt_message_id'] = msg.message_id

@owner_only
async def handle_hours_input(update: Update, context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    # Guard: ensure a game is selected and we're awaiting hours input
    if not context.user_data.get('selected_game') or not context.user_data.get('awaiting_hours'):
        return
    # Clear the awaiting_hours flag
    context.user_data.pop('awaiting_hours', None)

    # Try to delete the bot's question message
    hours_prompt_message_id = context.user_data.pop('hours_prompt_message_id', None)
    if hours_prompt_message_id:
        try:
            await context.bot.delete_message(chat_id=update.effective_chat.id, message_id=hours_prompt_message_id)
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"⚠️ Failed to delete bot's prompt message: {e}")

    # Parse the hours from the user's message
    try:
        hrs = float(update.message.text)
        if hrs <= 0:
            raise ValueError
    except ValueError:
        return await update.message.reply_text("⛔ Please enter a valid number of hours (e.g. 1.5).")

    # Delete the message where hours were entered
    try:
        await update.message.delete()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"⚠️ Failed to delete user message with hours: {e}")

    # Calculate end time
    chat_id = update.effective_chat.id
    now = int(time.time())
    end_time = now + int(hrs * 3600)

    # Initialize challenge state
    game_id = context.user_data.get('selected_game')
    ACTIVE_GAMES[chat_id] = {
        "game_id": game_id,
        "end_time": end_time,
        "message_id": None,
        "active": True
    }
    # Send or update the challenge message
    await edit_challenge_message(context, chat_id, init=True)
    save_active_challenges()
    # Schedule jobs to update countdown and finish challenge
    context.job_queue.run_once(finish_challenge_job, when=end_time-now, data={"chat_id": chat_id}, name=f"finish_{chat_id}")
    context.job_queue.run_repeating(update_challenge_job, interval=5, first=5, data={"chat_id": chat_id}, name=f"update_{chat_id}" )

@owner_only
async def stop_challenge(update: Update, context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    chat_id = update.effective_chat.id

    # Check of er iets actief is
    if chat_id not in ACTIVE_GAMES:
        await update.message.reply_text("❌ No active game to stop.")
        return

    # Stop bijbehorende jobs
    for job in context.job_queue.get_jobs_by_name(f"update_{chat_id}") + context.job_queue.get_jobs_by_name(f"finish_{chat_id}"):
        job.schedule_removal()

    # Haal state op en markeer als inactief
    state = ACTIVE_GAMES.pop(chat_id)
    state["active"] = False

    # Bepaal unieke sleutel
    msg_id = state.get("message_id")
    if msg_id:
        key = f"{chat_id}:{msg_id}"
    else:
        key = f"{chat_id}:{int(time.time())}"

    # Laad huidige challenges uit bestand
    all_challenges = load_all_challenges_raw()
    all_challenges[key] = state

    # Opslaan naar bestand
    try:
        with open(CHALLENGE_FILE, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            json.dump(all_challenges, f, indent=2)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"⚠️ Failed to save challenge: {e}")

    # Verwijder inline knop van het oorspronkelijke bericht (indien mogelijk)
    try:
        if state.get("message_id"):
            await context.bot.edit_message_reply_markup(chat_id=chat_id, message_id=state["message_id"], reply_markup=None)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"⚠️ Failed to remove reply_markup: {e}")

    # Bevestiging
    await update.message.reply_text("🛑 Game stopped.")

def stop_challenge_jobs(context, chat_id):
    # Stop alle jobs van deze challenge
    for job in context.job_queue.get_jobs_by_name(f"update_{chat_id}") + context.job_queue.get_jobs_by_name(f"finish_{chat_id}"):
        job.schedule_removal()
    # Verwijder challenge state
    state = ACTIVE_GAMES.pop(chat_id, None)
    if state:
        state["active"] = False
        msg_id = state.get("message_id")
        if msg_id:
            key = f"{chat_id}:{msg_id}"
        else:
            key = f"{chat_id}:{int(time.time())}"

        all_challenges = load_all_challenges_raw()
        all_challenges[key] = state
        with open(CHALLENGE_FILE, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            json.dump(all_challenges, f, indent=2)

async def show_leaderboard_menu(update: Update, context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    kb = [[InlineKeyboardButton(g['name'], callback_data=f"leaderboard_select|{g['id']}")] for g in GAMES]
    await update.message.reply_text(
        "For which game would you like to see the leaderboard?",
        reply_markup=InlineKeyboardMarkup(kb)
    )

async def show_games_menu(update: Update, context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    kb = [
        [InlineKeyboardButton(f"🎮 {g['name']}", url=make_startapp_url(g['id'], update.effective_chat.id))]
        for g in GAMES
    ]
    await update.message.reply_text(
        "Choose a game to play directly:",
        reply_markup=InlineKeyboardMarkup(kb)
    )

async def leaderboard_select_callback(update: Update, context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    q = update.callback_query
    await q.answer()
    gid = q.data.split("|")[1]
    game = next((g for g in GAMES if g['id'] == gid), None)
    if not game:
        return await q.edit_message_text("⛔ Invalid game")

    chat_id = update.effective_chat.id
    lb, lb_msg = get_leaderboard(chat_id, game['id'], limit=20)
    alltime, alltime_msg = get_alltime_leaderboard(chat_id, game['id'], limit=10)
    alltime_best, best_msg = get_best_players(chat_id=chat_id, max_places=10, top_n=10)

    lines = [f"🏆 {game['name']} Leaderboard", ""]
    if lb_msg:
        lines.append(lb_msg)
    else:
        for idx, (fn, ln, score) in enumerate(lb, start=1):
            name = f"{fn} {ln}".strip()
            lines.append(f"{idx}. {name} — {score}")

    lines += ["", "🔥 Alltime Top 10:", ""]
    if alltime_msg:
        lines.append(alltime_msg)
    else:
        for idx, (first_name, last_name, score) in enumerate(alltime, 1):
            display_name = f"{first_name or ''} {last_name or ''}".strip()
            lines.append(f"{idx}. {display_name} — {score}")

    lines += ["", "👑 Best Player Leaderboard:", ""]
    if best_msg:
        lines.append(best_msg)
    else:
        for idx, (fn, ln, score) in enumerate(alltime_best, 1):
            display_name = f"{fn or ''} {ln or ''}".strip()
            lines.append(f"{idx}. {display_name} — {score}")

    await q.edit_message_text("\n".join(lines))

async def global_leaderboard_select_callback(update: Update, context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    q = update.callback_query
    await q.answer()
    gid = q.data.split("|")[1]
    game = next((g for g in GAMES if g['id'] == gid), None)
    if not game:
        return await q.edit_message_text("⛔ Invalid game")

    lines = [f"🌍 Global Alltime Leaderboard - {game['name']}", ""]

    # Ophalen van alle relevante leaderboards
    global_lb, global_msg = get_global_leaderboard(game['id'])
    global_best_players, global_best_players_msg = get_global_best_players(limit=10)
    per_game_chat_lb, per_game_chat_msg = get_alltime_chat_leaderboard(game['id'], limit=10)
    global_best_chats, global_best_chats_msg = get_best_chat_leaderboard(limit=10)

    # 1. Global alltime per speler (voor deze game)
    if global_msg:
        lines.append(global_msg)
    else:
        for idx, (fn, ln, score) in enumerate(global_lb, start=1):
            display_name = f"{fn or ''} {ln or ''}".strip()
            lines.append(f"{idx}. {display_name} — {score}")

    # 2. Globale best players (over alle games)
    lines += ["", "👑 Global Best Player Leaderboard:", ""]
    if global_best_players_msg:
        lines.append(global_best_players_msg)
    else:
        for idx, (fn, ln, pts) in enumerate(global_best_players, start=1):
            name = f"{fn or ''} {ln or ''}".strip()
            lines.append(f"{idx}. {name} — {pts} pts")

    # 3. Alltime chat leaderboard (top groepen voor deze game)
    lines += ["", "🏅 Best Chat Leaderboard (for this game):", ""]
    if per_game_chat_msg:
        lines.append(per_game_chat_msg)
    else:
        show_idx = 1
        for (chat_title, pts) in per_game_chat_lb:
            # Toon alleen als chat_title niet leeg is én niet volledig uit cijfers bestaat
            title_clean = str(chat_title).strip()
            if title_clean and not title_clean.isdigit():
                lines.append(f"{show_idx}. {title_clean} — {pts} pts")
                show_idx += 1

    # 4. Global best chat leaderboard (over alle games)
    lines += ["", "🏆 Global Best Chat Leaderboard:", ""]
    if global_best_chats_msg:
        lines.append(global_best_chats_msg)
    else:
        show_idx = 1
        for (chat_title, pts) in global_best_chats:
            title_clean = str(chat_title).strip()
            if title_clean and not title_clean.isdigit():
                lines.append(f"{show_idx}. {title_clean} — {pts} pts")
                show_idx += 1

    await q.edit_message_text("\n".join(lines))

async def show_global_leaderboard_menu(update: Update, context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    kb = [[InlineKeyboardButton(g['name'], callback_data=f"global_leaderboard_select|{g['id']}")] for g in GAMES]
    await update.message.reply_text(
        "For which game do you like to see the leaderboard?",
        reply_markup=InlineKeyboardMarkup(kb)
    )

async def show_global_best_players(update: Update, context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    players, msg = get_global_best_players(limit=10)
    lines = ["🌍 Global Best Player Leaderboard", ""]
    if msg:
        lines.append(msg)
    else:
        for idx, (fn, ln, pts) in enumerate(players, start=1):
            name = f"{fn} {ln}".strip()
            lines.append(f"{idx}. {name} — {pts} pts")
    await update.message.reply_text("\n".join(lines))

@owner_only
async def reset_scores(update: Update, context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    kb = [[InlineKeyboardButton(g['name'], callback_data=f"reset_game|{g['id']}")] for g in GAMES]
    await update.message.reply_text("Which game to reset scores for?", reply_markup=InlineKeyboardMarkup(kb))

@owner_only
async def reset_game_callback(update: Update, context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    q = update.callback_query
    await q.answer()
    gid = q.data.split("|")[1]
    chat_id = update.effective_chat.id
    game = next((g for g in GAMES if g["id"] == gid), None)
    game_name = game["name"] if game else gid

    kb = InlineKeyboardMarkup([
        [
            InlineKeyboardButton("✅ Yes, reset scores", callback_data=f"confirm_reset|{gid}"),
            InlineKeyboardButton("❌ Cancel", callback_data="cancel_reset")
        ]
    ])
    await q.edit_message_text(
        f"⚠️ Are you sure you want to reset all current scores for <b>{game_name}</b> in this chat?\n\n"
        f"<b>This cannot be undone!</b>",
        parse_mode="HTML",
        reply_markup=kb
    )

@owner_only
async def confirm_reset_callback(update: Update, context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    q = update.callback_query
    await q.answer()
    gid = q.data.split("|")[1]
    chat_id = update.effective_chat.id
    game = next((g for g in GAMES if g["id"] == gid), None)
    game_name = game["name"] if game else gid

    reset_game_scores(gid, chat_id)
    for s in ACTIVE_GAMES.values():
        s['message_id'] = None
    await q.edit_message_text(
        f"✅ All scores for <b>{game_name}</b> have been reset in this chat.",
        parse_mode="HTML"
    )

@owner_only
async def cancel_reset_callback(update: Update, context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    q = update.callback_query
    await q.answer("Cancelled.", show_alert=False)
    await q.edit_message_text("❎ Reset cancelled.")

async def poll_and_update_chats(context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    global POLL_INTERVAL
    new_score_found = False

    try:
        resp = requests.get(f"{SCORE_SERVER}/active_chats")
        if resp.status_code == 200 and resp.text.strip().startswith("{"):
            chat_ids = resp.json().get("chats", [])
        else:
            chat_ids = []
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Failed to fetch active chats: {e}")
        chat_ids = []

    for chat_id in chat_ids:
        if not str(chat_id).startswith("-"):
            continue  # skip private chats

        # Update chat title (idem als nu)
        try:
            chat = await context.bot.get_chat(chat_id)
            if chat.type in ["group", "supergroup", "channel"]:
                chat_title = getattr(chat, "title", "")
                if chat_title:
                    r = requests.post(f"{SCORE_SERVER}/update_chat_title", json={"chat_id": chat_id, "chat_title": chat_title})
                    r.raise_for_status()
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"Failed to update chat_title for {chat_id}: {e}")

        # Poll top score (idem als nu)
        for game in GAMES:
            game_id = game["id"]
            lb, msg = get_leaderboard(chat_id, game_id)
            if msg or not lb:
                continue
            top_fn, top_ln, top_score = lb[0]
            cache_key = f"{chat_id}|{game_id}"
            last_score = LAST_TOP_SCORES.get(cache_key)

            if last_score != top_score:
                LAST_TOP_SCORES[cache_key] = top_score
                save_last_top_scores()
                print(f"📈 New top score in {game_id} (chat {chat_id}): {top_fn} {top_ln} — {top_score}")

                game_name = next((g["name"] for g in GAMES if g["id"] == game_id), game_id)

                await send_highscore_gif(
                    context,
                    chat_id=chat_id,
                    first_name=top_fn,
                    last_name=top_ln,
                    game_name=game_name,
                    score=top_score
                )
                new_score_found = True

    # Pas interval aan voor volgende poll:
    if new_score_found:
        POLL_INTERVAL = MIN_POLL_INTERVAL
    else:
        POLL_INTERVAL = min(POLL_INTERVAL + POLL_BACKOFF, MAX_POLL_INTERVAL)

    # Schedule next run
    context.job_queue.run_once(poll_and_update_chats, when=POLL_INTERVAL)

def main():
    global LAST_TOP_SCORES
    LAST_TOP_SCORES = load_last_top_scores()
    global ACTIVE_GAMES
    all_challenges = load_active_challenges()
    now = int(time.time())

    # Optioneel: bewaren voor restore of logging
    global FULL_CHALLENGE_LOG
    FULL_CHALLENGE_LOG = all_challenges.copy()

    # Alleen actieve challenges in geheugen houden
    ACTIVE_GAMES = {
        chat_id: state
        for chat_id, state in all_challenges.items()
        if state.get("end_time", 0) > now and state.get("active", True)
        }
    app = ApplicationBuilder().token(BOT_TOKEN).build()
    now = int(time.time())
    for chat_id, state in ACTIVE_GAMES.items():
        remaining = state["end_time"] - now
        if remaining > 0:
            app.job_queue.run_once(finish_challenge_job, when=remaining, data={"chat_id": chat_id}, name=f"finish_{chat_id}")
            app.job_queue.run_repeating(update_challenge_job, interval=5, first=5, data={"chat_id": chat_id}, name=f"update_{chat_id}")
    app.job_queue.run_once(poll_and_update_chats, when=10)
    app.add_handler(CommandHandler("start", start, filters.ChatType.GROUPS))
    app.add_handler(CommandHandler("stop", stop_challenge, filters.ChatType.GROUPS))
    app.add_handler(CommandHandler("leaderboard", show_leaderboard_menu, filters.ChatType.GROUPS))
    app.add_handler(CommandHandler("global", show_global_leaderboard_menu, filters.ChatType.GROUPS))
    app.add_handler(CommandHandler("reset", reset_scores, filters.ChatType.GROUPS))
    app.add_handler(CallbackQueryHandler(confirm_reset_callback, pattern=r"^confirm_reset\|"))
    app.add_handler(CommandHandler("games", show_games_menu, filters.ChatType.GROUPS))
    app.add_handler(CallbackQueryHandler(button_handler, pattern=r"^select_game\|"))
    app.add_handler(CallbackQueryHandler(reset_game_callback, pattern=r"^reset_game\|"))
    app.add_handler(CallbackQueryHandler(leaderboard_select_callback, pattern=r"^leaderboard_select\|"))
    app.add_handler(CallbackQueryHandler(global_leaderboard_select_callback, pattern=r"^global_leaderboard_select\|"))
    app.add_handler(MessageHandler(filters.TEXT & filters.User(OWNER_IDS), handle_hours_input))
    print("Bot is running!")
    app.run_polling()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
